full_text:
Mangyachang 忙牙長
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Mangyachang (忙牙長). Second in command to the Nanman’s armies. Killed by Ma Dai. Mangyachang is a fictional character. Mangyachang was affiliated with Nanman. Mangyachang lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
